Bash(python3 -c "
import json
with open\('public/assets/ukraine_oblasts.geojson'\) as f:
    data = json.load\(f\)
print\(f'{len\(data[\\"features\\"]\)} features'\)
for feat in data['features']:
    p = feat['properties']
    g = feat['geometry']['type']
    coords = feat['geometry']['coordinates']
    npts = sum\(len\(r\) for r in \(coords[0] if g=='Polygon' else coords[0][0]\)\)
    print\(f'  {p[\\"id\\"]:20s}  {p[\\"name\\"]:30s}  {g:14s}  ~{npts} pts'\)
" 2>&1 | head -35)

")

Bash(python3 -c "
import json

# Check oblasts
with open\('public/assets/ukraine_oblasts.geojson'\) as f:
    d = json.load\(f\)
print\(f'Oblasts: {len\(d[\\"features\\"]\)} features'\)
print\('First 3:', [\(f['properties'].get\('id','?'\), f['properties'].get\('name','?'\)\) for f in d['features'][:3]]\)
print\('Geometry types:', set\(f['geometry']['type'] for f in d['features']\)\)

# Check border
with open\('public/assets/ukraine_border.geojson'\) as f:
    d2 = json.load\(f\)
print\(f'Border: {len\(d2[\\"features\\"]\)} features, type={d2[\\"features\\"][0][\\"geometry\\"][\\"type\\"]}'\)

# Check infrastructure
with open\('public/assets/infrastructure.json'\) as f:
    infra = json.load\(f\)
print\(f'Infrastructure: {len\(infra\)} objects'\)

# Check cities
with open\('public/assets/cities.json'\) as f:
    cities = json.load\(f\)
print\(f'Cities: {len\(cities\)} entries'\)
")

Bash(python3 -c "
import json
with open\('public/assets/infrastructure.json'\) as f:
    data = json.load\(f\)

by_type = {}
for obj in data:
    t = obj['type']
    by_type[t] = by_type.get\(t, 0\) + 1

print\(f'Total: {len\(data\)} objects'\)
for t, n in sorted\(by_type.items\(\)\):
    print\(f'  {t}: {n}'\)

# Verify all have required fields
for obj in data:
    for field in ['id','name','type','lat','lon','capacity','status']:
        assert field in obj, f'{obj[\\"id\\"]} missing {field}'
print\('All required fields present.'\)
")

Bash(python3 -c "
import re, json

with open\('public/assets/power_lines.json'\) as f:
    raw = f.read\(\)

# Remove // comments \(not inside strings\)
cleaned = re.sub\(r'\\s*//[^\\n]*', '', raw\)

# Validate and reformat
data = json.loads\(cleaned\)
with open\('public/assets/power_lines.json', 'w'\) as f:
    json.dump\(data, f, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False\)

print\(f'Valid JSON: {len\(data\)} power lines'\)
by_v = {}
for pl in data:
    by_v[pl['voltage']] = by_v.get\(pl['voltage'], 0\) + 1
for v, n in sorted\(by_v.items\(\)\):
    print\(f'  {v}: {n}'\)
")

Bash(python3 -c "
import json

# Verify all power line node IDs exist in infrastructure.json
with open\('public/assets/infrastructure.json'\) as f:
    infra = {obj['id'] for obj in json.load\(f\)}
with open\('public/assets/power_lines.json'\) as f:
    lines = json.load\(f\)

broken = [\(l['id'], side, l[side]\) for l in lines for side in \('from','to'\) if l[side] not in infra]
if broken:
    for b in broken: print\('BROKEN REF:', b\)
else:
    print\(f'All {len\(lines\)} power line endpoints resolve correctly.'\)
    active = sum\(1 for l in lines if l['status'] == 'active'\)
    damaged = sum\(1 for l in lines if l['status'] == 'damaged'\)
    inactive = sum\(1 for l in lines if l['status'] == 'inactive'\)
    print\(f'  active={active}  damaged={damaged}  inactive={inactive}'\)
")
